expectations.evidence: Output includes dedicated sections for LCP (Largest Contentful Paint), INP (Interaction to Next Paint), and CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift), each stating no impact.
The three CWV metrics are listed as separate sections. No detailed checklist items (CWV-01 through CWV-11), but the three core metrics serve as equivalent coverage.
States 'Core Web Vitals impact: NONE' with per-metric reasoning that no frontend code was changed. Notes the project has no web page files.

eval_feedback.overall: The without_skill run covers all three metrics and provides correct impact analysis, but lacks the structured 11-item checklist that the with_skill run produced. The output is shorter and less detailed.
